text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper is titled "DrugChat: Towards Enabling ChatGPT-Like Capabilities on Drug **Molecule Graphs**" (arXiv:2309.03907), authored by Youwei Liang, Ruiyi Zhang, Li Zhang, and Pengtao Xie. The cited reference uses a slightly different subtitle ("drug molecule **data**" instead of "molecule graphs"), the wrong arXiv ID (2304.02285, which points to an entirely unrelated paper), and a completely fabricated author list (none of the 6 cited authors match the real 4 authors).
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03907
